pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-S-010 (LS, Skill) excluded on seniority grounds. Text contains executive-level content not aligned with IC-to-senior-IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5159. Framework signals: nist_ai_rmf=0.516, eu_ai_act=0.469, ddat=0.456. ANL roles in scope are individual contributors through senior ICs; organizational or C-suite-level responsibilities fall outside this band.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Seniority concerns confirmed. Score 0.5159 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-S-010 (composite 0.5159) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Executive-level content in KSA text is not found in IC-to-senior-IC role profiles per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External ground truth confirms seniority mismatch. Exclusion upheld.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.5159 is not a standard requirement for Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5159, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
